steps.title: Intake and inventory
steps.why: A machine that is not in inventory does not exist when it goes missing.
steps.done_when: Asset tag issued; it becomes the hostname.
steps.record: Device in inventory with tag, serial, model.

steps.title: Clean current OS
steps.why: Golden images are stale five days after you make them  -  build live from a clean, fully-updated OS instead; configuration comes from the domain and the checklist, not a stamp.

subtasks.title: Clean install / OOBE with all OS and firmware updates
Join to the domain
subtasks.done_when: Machine object appears in ADUC; GPOs apply on gpupdate.

steps.title: Enable BitLocker
steps.why: Lost or stolen disks are unreadable; encryption at rest is policy.
steps.instructions: Applies via GPO on domain join. Manual fallback: Control Panel > BitLocker > Turn On.
steps.done_when: Recovery key VISIBLE IN AD (computer object > BitLocker Recovery tab)  -  not when the progress bar finishes; GPO escrow silently fails sometimes.
steps.record: Escrow the key into the registry against the asset tag anyway  -  AD is the copy that sometimes does not save.

steps.title: Endpoint agents
steps.done_when: Machine reports in each console (AV, monitoring, management).

steps.title: Standard software set
steps.instructions: Use /install at the bench  -  it reads the installers share for this platform; 32/64-bit stays coherent with the machine.

steps.title: Mobility: VPN and off-network readiness
steps.why: A laptop that only works on the office LAN is a desktop with a battery.
steps.instructions: Pull the VPN profile at the bench - type /vpn in this SOP to pick it from the installers share. Confirm email and core tools work OFF the office network (hotspot test).
steps.done_when: VPN connects from an outside network and the daily tools load through it.
steps.record: VPN profile name noted on the device record.

steps.title: QA before it enters the ready pool
steps.why: The pool only works if "ready" means ready  -  onboarding trusts it blindly.
steps.done_when: A test user session works end to end.
steps.record: Device marked READY in inventory  -  it can now be assigned by onboarding.
